---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve and fix the problem
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: Virus5600
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Does it crash the game?
An unexpected or incorrect behavior?

## Root Cause

Point out what you think is the root cause of the bug. If you don't know, that's
fine too. Include the log files and/or crash report if the game crashed which
can be found at `%appdata%/.minecraft/logs` or `%appdata%/.minecraft/crash-reports`

### **To Reproduce**

Provide the steps to reproduce the behavior if you can. Include as many details
as possible. For example:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What are you expecting to happen when you do the action that causes the bug?

## Fix

If you have a fix for the bug, please describe it here. If you don't know how to fix
it, that's fine too. If you have a pull request, please link it here.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. Label them
clearly and provide context for each screenshot.

## Additional Information

**Please complete the following information:**

- Fabric Version: [e.g. 0.14.10]
- Minecraft Version [e.g. 1.19.2]
- Mod Version [e.g. v1.0.0-beta]

You can also add more context and information in this section. For example, if
you are using other mods, please list them here. If you are using a modpack,
please provide the name and version of the modpack. If you are using a custom
launcher, please provide the name and version of the launcher.
